steps.title: Use the application clue
steps.content: The passage says lessons from past biodiversity declines may apply to endangered species today. The blank should describe those lessons as connected to and useful for the current policy problem.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A means peculiar to one case, not broadly applicable. Choice B concerns simplified presentation. Choice D suggests uncertainty about value. The word that means applicable to the present situation matches the clue. The answer is C.
